name: ud3tn-utils
documentation:
# python-uD3TN-utils

The Python package uD3TN-utils is a utility library to simplify the interaction
with the uD3TN daemon within python applications.

The included `AAPClient` enables user-friendly communication with the uD3TN
daemon via local or remote sockets using the Application Agent Protocol (AAP).
Besides sending and receiving bundles, it is also possible to change the
configuration of the uD3TN daemon via AAP messages.

## Installation

From source:

```sh
git clone https://gitlab.com/d3tn/ud3tn
cd python-ud3tn-utils
python setup.py install
```

From [PyPi](https://pypi.org/project/ud3tn-utils) directly:

```sh
pip install ud3tn-utils
```

## Examples

```python
from ud3tn_utils.aap import AAPUnixClient

with AAPUnixClient() as aap_client:
    aap_client.register()
    aap_client.send_str(aap_client.eid(), "Hello World")
    print(aap_client.receive())
```

## Development

pyD3TN is maintained as part of the µD3TN project and follows its development
processes. Please see the [µD3TN][ud3tn] repository for the code and further
information.

[ud3tn]: https://gitlab.com/d3tn/ud3tn

documentation:

in a BIBE Administrative Record, thus forming a BIBE Bundle.

Args:
    inner_source (str): Source EID of the encapsulated bundle
    inner_dest (str): Destination EID of the encapsulated bundle
    payload (bytes): The payload of the encapsulated bundle

Returns:

modules.name: ud3tn_utils.aap.aap_message
documentation:
μD3TN Application Agent Protocol (AAP) Python implementation.

Usage:
    Use the AAPMessage class to build, serialize, and parse AAP messages.
    For a description of the protocol, see
    https://gitlab.com/d3tn/ud3tn/-/blob/master/doc/ud3tn_aap.md.
SPDX-License-Identifier: BSD-3-Clause OR Apache-2.0

classes.name: ud3tn_utils.aap.aap_message.InsufficientAAPDataError
documentation:
The binary AAP message appears to be valid but is missing some bytes.

Args:
    bytes_needed: The total amount of bytes required to perform the next
                  parsing step.

classes.name: ud3tn_utils.aap.aap_message.AAPMessageType
documentation: AAP message type codes.

classes.name: ud3tn_utils.aap.aap_message.AAPMessage

methods.name: ud3tn_utils.aap.aap_message.AAPMessage.serialize
documentation: Serialize the AAP message to its on-wire representation.

methods.name: ud3tn_utils.aap.aap_message.AAPMessage.decode_bundle_id
documentation:
Decode the contained bundle ID to timestamp and sequence number.

If the used bundle ID format is with timestamp, this function returns
a tuple of the milliseconds elapsed since the DTN epoch and the
sequence number. If the format without timestamp is used, a tuple
containing only the sequence number is returned. If an invalid
bundle ID (e.g. by an old uD3TN version) is provided, a ValueError
is raised.

methods.name: ud3tn_utils.aap.aap_message.AAPMessage.parse
documentation:
Parse the provided AAP on-wire representation.

An instance of AAPMessage is returned on success.
If there are not enough bytes provided, an InsufficientAAPDataError is
raised, allowing the caller to wait for more data.
If invalid data is provided, a ValueError is raised.

methods.name: ud3tn_utils.aap.aap_message.AAPMessage.encode_bundle_id
documentation:
Encode the provided values into the uD3TN bundle ID format.

Args:
    timestamp_ms: A DTN time in milliseconds to be encoded into the
        bundle ID. If None, the bundle ID format without timestamp
        will be used.
    seqnum: The sequence number to be encoded into the bundle ID.
An AAP message representation supporting parsing and serialization.

functions.name: ud3tn_utils.aap2.bin.aap2_bdm_ud3tn_routing.sleep_until
documentation:
Sleep using asyncio.sleep until the specified time is reached.

This function returns immediately if the specified timestamp is in the
past. This function may only be called from within asyncio callbacks,
tasks, or coroutines.

documentation: Return the own EID including agent ID.

documentation: Return the EID prefix.

documentation: Return True if the connected node uses the `ipn` EID scheme.

methods.name: ud3tn_utils.aap2.aap2_client.AAP2Client.response_status_name
documentation:
Get the name for the specified AAP2 ResponseStatus code.

Args:
    status: The integer ResponseStatus code returned by µD3TN.

Return:
    A string representation of status, or "<unknown>" for values not
    part of the ResponseStatus enum.

methods.name: ud3tn_utils.aap2.aap2_client.AAP2Client._check_first_byte
documentation: Check first byte received from the server, which must be 0x2f.

methods.name: ud3tn_utils.aap2.aap2_client.AAP2Client._process_welcome
documentation: Decode and store properties received in the WELCOME message.

methods.name: ud3tn_utils.aap2.aap2_client.AAP2Client._prepare_config_msg
documentation: Create an AAPMessage for the CONFIGURE operation.

methods.name: ud3tn_utils.aap2.aap2_client.AAP2Client._check_success
documentation: Check that the provided AAPResponse reports success.

A context manager class for connecting to uD3TN's AAP 2.0 socket.

Note:
    This is an abstract base class for four concrete implementations:
    `AAP2UnixClient` for synchronous connections to UNIX domain sockets,
    `AAP2TCPClient` for synchronous connections to TCP sockets,
    `AAP2AsyncUnixClient` for asynchronous connections to UNIX domain
    sockets, and `AAP2AsyncTCPClient` for asynchronous connections to
    TCP sockets.

Args:
    address: The address of the remote socket to connect to.

Attributes:
    address: The address used to connect to the socket.
    node_eid (str): The local node ID of the connected uD3TN instance.
    agent_id (str): The agent ID assigned to this client.

classes.name: ud3tn_utils.aap2.aap2_client.AAP2SyncClient

methods.name: ud3tn_utils.aap2.aap2_client.AAP2SyncClient.connect
documentation:
Establish a socket connection to a uD3TN instance and return the
received welcome message.

Raises:
    AAP2CommunicationError: On issues receiving data.
    AAP2UnexpectedMessage: If the wrong data was received.
    protobuf.message.DecodeError: If parsing the message fails.
    OSError: If socket communication fails.

methods.name: ud3tn_utils.aap2.aap2_client.AAP2SyncClient.disconnect
documentation: Shutdown and close the socket.

methods.name: ud3tn_utils.aap2.aap2_client.AAP2SyncClient.__enter__
documentation:
Return `self` upon calling `self.connect()` to establish the socket
connection. See the documentation of the `connect` method.

methods.name: ud3tn_utils.aap2.aap2_client.AAP2SyncClient.__exit__
documentation: Invoke `self.disconnect()` on any raised runtime exception.

methods.name: ud3tn_utils.aap2.aap2_client.AAP2SyncClient._welcome
documentation:
Receive the AAP welcome message and store the node EID of the uD3TN
instance in `self.node_eid`.

methods.name: ud3tn_utils.aap2.aap2_client.AAP2SyncClient.configure
documentation:
Attempt to configure the connection as specified.

Args:
    agent_id: The agent identifier to be registered. If None,
        uuid.uuid4() is called to generate one.
    subscribe: Whether to subscribe for bundles (be a passive client)
        or not (be an active client, for sending bundles).
    secret: The AAP 2.0 authentication secret: A value that has to
        match for multiple connections re-using the same agent ID.
        If not specified, a random value will be generated.
    auth_type: The requested AAP 2.0 authentication type.
    keepalive_seconds: The interval in which keepalive messages are
        expected by uD3TN for active clients or will be sent by uD3TN
        to passive clients. Note that uD3TN will close the connection
        if an active client does not send a keepalive message within
        twice this interval. Set to zero (default value) to disable.
Return:
    The secret that can be used for registering additional connections.

Raises:
    AAP2CommunicationError: On issues receiving data.
    AAP2ServerDisconnected: If µD3TN disconnected in the meantime.
    AAP2OperationFailed: If uD3TN indicates a processing error.
    protobuf.message.DecodeError: If parsing the response fails.
    OSError: If socket communication fails.

methods.name: ud3tn_utils.aap2.aap2_client.AAP2SyncClient._receive_delimited
documentation:
Receive and return a byte array for which the length is indicated
in a preceding Protobuf varint.

methods.name: ud3tn_utils.aap2.aap2_client.AAP2SyncClient.receive_msg
documentation:
Receive and return the next `AAPMessage`.

Return:
    The AAPMessage received from uD3TN.

Raises:
    AAP2CommunicationError: On issues receiving data.
    AAP2ServerDisconnected: If µD3TN disconnected in the meantime.
    protobuf.message.DecodeError: If parsing the message fails.
    OSError: If socket communication fails.

methods.name: ud3tn_utils.aap2.aap2_client.AAP2SyncClient.receive_response
documentation:
Receive and return the next `AAPResponse`.

Return:
    The AAPResponse received from uD3TN.

Raises:
    AAP2CommunicationError: On issues receiving data.
    AAP2ServerDisconnected: If µD3TN disconnected in the meantime.
    protobuf.message.DecodeError: If parsing the message fails.
    OSError: If socket communication fails.

methods.name: ud3tn_utils.aap2.aap2_client.AAP2SyncClient.receive_adu
documentation:
Receive a bundle ADU (Protobuf with extra payload data).

Args:
    adu_msg (aap_pb2.BundleADU): If the `BundleADU` message was already
        received, it must be passed using this argument. Otherwise,
        the function will call `receive_msg` to receive the next
        message, which must be of type `BundleADU`.

Return:
    A tuple of the form (BundleADU, data) containing the received
    `BundleADU` message as metadata describing the ADU payload, and
    the ADU binary payload itself.

Raises:
    AAP2UnexpectedMessage: If the message received was not of type
        `BundleADU` (if `adu_msg` was set to `None`).
    AAP2CommunicationError: On issues receiving data.
    AAP2ServerDisconnected: If µD3TN disconnected in the meantime.
    protobuf.message.DecodeError: If parsing the message fails.
    OSError: If socket communication fails.

methods.name: ud3tn_utils.aap2.aap2_client.AAP2SyncClient.send
documentation:
Serialize and send the provided Protobuf message including header.

Args:
    msg: The Protobuf message to be sent. Can be, e.g., an `AAPMessage`
        or an `AAPResponse`.

Raises:
    protobuf.message.EncodeError: If `msg` isn't initialized.
    OSError: If socket communication fails.

methods.name: ud3tn_utils.aap2.aap2_client.AAP2SyncClient.send_adu
documentation:
Send a bundle ADU (Protobuf with extra payload data).

Args:
    adu_msg (aap2_pb2.BundleADU): The metadata describing the ADU in
        the form of a `BundleADU` message.
    bundle_data (bytes): The binary payload data to be sent.

Raises:
    ValueError: If the length of `bundle_data` does not match the
        `payload_data` field of `adu_msg`.
    protobuf.message.EncodeError: If `adu_msg` isn't initialized.
    OSError: If socket communication fails.

methods.name: ud3tn_utils.aap2.aap2_client.AAP2SyncClient.send_response_status
documentation:
Send an AAPResponse with the specified status code.

Args:
    status (aap2_pb2.ResponseStatus): The status code to be sent.

Raises:
    OSError: If socket communication fails.
Provides common functions of the synchronous AAP2 clients.

classes.name: ud3tn_utils.aap2.aap2_client.AAP2UnixClient
documentation:
A context manager class for connecting to uD3TN's AAP 2.0 Unix socket.

Args:
    address: The address (PATH) of the remote socket to be used when
        calling `socket.connect()`

classes.name: ud3tn_utils.aap2.aap2_client.AAP2TCPClient
documentation:
A context manager class for connecting to uD3TN's AAP 2.0 TCP socket.

Args:
    address: The address tuple (HOST, PORT) of the remote socket to be used
        when calling `socket.connect()`

Establish a socket connection to a uD3TN instance and return the

    protobuf.message.DecodeError: If parsing the message fails.

Return `self` upon calling `self.connect()` to establish the socket

Attempt to configure the connection as specified.

Args:

    auth_type: The requested AAP 2.0 authentication type.
    keepalive_seconds: The interval in which keepalive messages are

        to passive clients. Note that uD3TN will close the connection

        twice this interval. Set to zero (default value) to disable.
Return:
    The secret that can be used for registering additional connections.

Raises:
    AAP2CommunicationError: On issues receiving data.
    AAP2ServerDisconnected: If µD3TN disconnected in the meantime.
    AAP2OperationFailed: If uD3TN indicates a processing error.
    protobuf.message.DecodeError: If parsing the response fails.
    asyncio.IncompleteReadError: If the socket is closed unexpectedly.

methods.name: ud3tn_utils.aap2.aap2_client.AAP2AsyncClient._receive_delimited
documentation:
Receive and return a byte array for which the length is indicated
in a preceding Protobuf varint.

methods.name: ud3tn_utils.aap2.aap2_client.AAP2AsyncClient.receive_msg
documentation:
Receive and return the next `AAPMessage`.

Note that this function is not concurrency-safe.

Return:
    The AAPMessage received from uD3TN.

Raises:
    AAP2CommunicationError: On issues receiving data.
    AAP2ServerDisconnected: If µD3TN disconnected in the meantime.
    protobuf.message.DecodeError: If parsing the message fails.
    asyncio.exceptions.CancelledError: If receiving is cancelled (e.g.,
        on program termination).

methods.name: ud3tn_utils.aap2.aap2_client.AAP2AsyncClient.receive_response
documentation:
Receive and return the next `AAPResponse`.

Note that this function is not concurrency-safe.

Return:
    The AAPResponse received from uD3TN.

Raises:
    AAP2CommunicationError: On issues receiving data.
    AAP2ServerDisconnected: If µD3TN disconnected in the meantime.
    protobuf.message.DecodeError: If parsing the message fails.
    asyncio.exceptions.CancelledError: If receiving is cancelled (e.g.,
        on program termination).

methods.name: ud3tn_utils.aap2.aap2_client.AAP2AsyncClient.receive_adu
documentation:
Receive a bundle ADU (Protobuf with extra payload data).

Note that this function is not concurrency-safe.

Args:
    adu_msg (aap_pb2.BundleADU): If the `BundleADU` message was already
        received, it must be passed using this argument. Otherwise,
        the function will call `receive_msg` to receive the next
        message, which must be of type `BundleADU`.

Return:
    A tuple of the form (BundleADU, data) containing the received
    `BundleADU` message as metadata describing the ADU payload, and
    the ADU binary payload itself.

Raises:
    AAP2UnexpectedMessage: If the message received was not of type
        `BundleADU` (if `adu_msg` was set to `None`).
    AAP2CommunicationError: On issues receiving data.
    AAP2ServerDisconnected: If µD3TN disconnected in the meantime.
    protobuf.message.DecodeError: If parsing the message fails.
    asyncio.exceptions.CancelledError: If receiving is cancelled (e.g.,
        on program termination).

methods.name: ud3tn_utils.aap2.aap2_client.AAP2AsyncClient.send
documentation:
Serialize and send the provided Protobuf message including header.

Note that this function is not concurrency-safe.

Args:
    msg: The Protobuf message to be sent. Can be, e.g., an `AAPMessage`
        or an `AAPResponse`.

Raises:
    protobuf.message.EncodeError: If `msg` isn't initialized.
    ConnectionResetError: If the socket is closed unexpectedly.

methods.name: ud3tn_utils.aap2.aap2_client.AAP2AsyncClient.send_adu
documentation:
Send a bundle ADU (Protobuf with extra payload data).

Note that this function is not concurrency-safe.

Args:
    adu_msg (aap2_pb2.BundleADU): The metadata describing the ADU in
        the form of a `BundleADU` message.
    bundle_data (bytes): The binary payload data to be sent.

Raises:
    ValueError: If the length of `bundle_data` does not match the
        `payload_data` field of `adu_msg`.
    protobuf.message.EncodeError: If `adu_msg` isn't initialized.
    ConnectionResetError: If the socket is closed unexpectedly.

methods.name: ud3tn_utils.aap2.aap2_client.AAP2AsyncClient.send_rpc
documentation:
Equivalent to calling send() and receive_response() with a lock.

Args:
    msg: The Protobuf message to be sent. Can be, e.g., an `AAPMessage`
        or an `AAPResponse`.

Return:
    The AAPResponse received from uD3TN.

Raises:
    protobuf.message.EncodeError: If `msg` isn't initialized.
    ConnectionResetError: If the socket is closed unexpectedly.
    AAP2CommunicationError: On issues receiving data.
    AAP2ServerDisconnected: If µD3TN disconnected in the meantime.
    protobuf.message.DecodeError: If parsing the message fails.
    asyncio.exceptions.CancelledError: If receiving is cancelled (e.g.,
        on program termination).

methods.name: ud3tn_utils.aap2.aap2_client.AAP2AsyncClient.send_adu_rpc
documentation:
Equivalent to calling send_adu() and receive_response() with a lock.

Note that this function is not concurrency-safe.

Args:
    adu_msg (aap2_pb2.BundleADU): The metadata describing the ADU in
        the form of a `BundleADU` message.
    bundle_data (bytes): The binary payload data to be sent.

Return:
    The AAPResponse received from uD3TN.

Raises:
    ValueError: If the length of `bundle_data` does not match the
        `payload_data` field of `adu_msg`.
    protobuf.message.EncodeError: If `adu_msg` isn't initialized.
    ConnectionResetError: If the socket is closed unexpectedly.
    AAP2CommunicationError: On issues receiving data.
    AAP2ServerDisconnected: If µD3TN disconnected in the meantime.
    protobuf.message.DecodeError: If parsing the message fails.
    asyncio.exceptions.CancelledError: If receiving is cancelled (e.g.,
        on program termination).

methods.name: ud3tn_utils.aap2.aap2_client.AAP2AsyncClient.send_response_status
documentation:
Send an AAPResponse with the specified status code.

Note that this function is not concurrency-safe.

Args:
    status (aap2_pb2.ResponseStatus): The status code to be sent.
Provides common functions of the asynchronous AAP2 clients.

classes.name: ud3tn_utils.aap2.aap2_client.AAP2AsyncUnixClient
documentation:
An asynchronous client for connecting to uD3TN's AAP 2.0 Unix socket.

Args:
    address: The address (PATH) of the remote socket.

classes.name: ud3tn_utils.aap2.aap2_client.AAP2AsyncTCPClient
documentation:
An asynchronous client for connecting to uD3TN's AAP 2.0 TCP socket.

Args:
    address: The address tuple (HOST, PORT) of the remote socket.

classes.name: ud3tn_utils.aap.aap_client.AAPClient

methods.name: ud3tn_utils.aap.aap_client.AAPClient.connect
documentation:
Establish a socket connection to a uD3TN instance and return the
received welcome message.

methods.name: ud3tn_utils.aap.aap_client.AAPClient.disconnect
documentation: Shutdown and close the socket.

methods.name: ud3tn_utils.aap.aap_client.AAPClient.__enter__
documentation:
Return `self` upon calling `self.connect()` to establish the socket
connection.

methods.name: ud3tn_utils.aap.aap_client.AAPClient.__exit__
documentation: Invoke `self.disconnect()` on any raised runtime exception.

methods.name: ud3tn_utils.aap.aap_client.AAPClient._welcome
documentation:
Receive the AAP welcome message and store the node EID of the uD3TN
instance in `self.node_eid`.

methods.name: ud3tn_utils.aap.aap_client.AAPClient.eid
documentation: Return the own EID.

methods.name: ud3tn_utils.aap.aap_client.AAPClient.register
documentation:
Attempt to register the specified agent identifier.

Args:
    agent_id: The agent identifier to be registered. If None,
        uuid.uuid4() is called to generate one.

methods.name: ud3tn_utils.aap.aap_client.AAPClient.ping
documentation:
Send a PING message via AAP and returns the ACK message (e.g. for
keepalive purposes).

methods.name: ud3tn_utils.aap.aap_client.AAPClient.receive
documentation: Receive and return the next `AAPMessage`.

methods.name: ud3tn_utils.aap.aap_client.AAPClient.send
documentation:
Serialize and send the provided `AAPMessage` to the AAP endpoint.

Args:
    aap_msg: The `AAPMessage` to be sent.

methods.name: ud3tn_utils.aap.aap_client.AAPClient.send_bundle
documentation:
Send the provided bundle to the AAP endpoint.

Args:
    dest_eid: The destination EID.
    bundle_data: The binary payload data to be encapsulated in a
        bundle.
    bibe: Whether the AAPClient should send a SENDBIBE message (True)
        or a SENDBUNDLE message (False). Defaults to False.

methods.name: ud3tn_utils.aap.aap_client.AAPClient.send_str
documentation:
Send the provided bundle to the AAP endpoint.

Args:
    dest_eid: The destination EID.
    bundle_data: The string message to be utf-8 encoded and
        encapsulated in a bundle.

A context manager class for connecting to the AAP socket of a uD3TN
instance.

        `socket.connect()`

classes.name: ud3tn_utils.aap.aap_client.AAPTCPClient

documentation: SPDX-License-Identifier: BSD-3-Clause OR Apache-2.0

functions.name: ud3tn_utils.config.unix2dtn
documentation:
Converts a given Unix timestamp into a DTN timestamp

Its inversion is {func}`dtn2unix`.

Args:

: unix_timestamp: Unix timestamp

Returns:

: numeric: DTN timestamp

functions.name: ud3tn_utils.config.make_contact
documentation:
Create a {class}`Contact` tuple relative to the current time

Args:

: start_offset (int): Start point of the contact from in seconds from now
  duration (int): Duration of the contact in seconds
  bitrate (int): Bitrate of the contact, in bytes per second

Returns:

: Contact: contact tuple with DTN timestamps

classes.name: ud3tn_utils.config.RouterCommand
documentation: uD3TN Command Constants

classes.name: ud3tn_utils.config.ConfigMessage
documentation:
uD3TN configuration message that can be processes by its config agent.
These messages are used to configure contacts in uD3TN.

Args:
    eid (str): The endpoint identifier of a contact
    cla_address (str): The Convergency Layer Adapter (CLA) address for the
        contact's EID
    reachable_eids (List[str], optional): List of reachable EIDs via this
        contact
    contacts (List[Contact], optional): List of contacts with the node
    type (RouterCommand, optional): Type of the configuration message (add,
        remove, ...)
